assertions.description: DOMParser is still available for XML; only external entity loading is removed.
An XML document referencing an external DTD does not synchronously fetch it. Parsing completes with the root element intact.
assertions.test: (()=>{const p=new DOMParser();const xml='<!DOCTYPE r SYSTEM "http://nowhere.invalid/x.dtd"><r/>';const d=p.parseFromString(xml,'application/xml');return d.documentElement && d.documentElement.localName==='r';})()

assertions.description: Internally declared entities (inline in the DTD) continue to be resolved.
Plain well-formed XML without external references continues to parse without error.
